name_en: CARPO (Center for Applied Research in Partnership with the Orient)
description: Bonn-based independent research centre focused on the Middle East, Gulf, and Iran. Co-founded by [Adnan Tabatabai](/people/adnan-tabatabai), a German-Iranian analyst specializing in Iranian domestic politics and foreign policy. CARPO produces policy-oriented research and organizes Track II dialogues between European and Iranian stakeholders.
